body_txt: There are certain bodily gestures that people commonly do. Sometimes, they do a simple handshake. Another example is the Handshake Substitute , which includes fist-bumps, or the more complex Secret Handshake . However, there's another bodily gesture that's lesser-known, although still recognizable: the butt bump. This gesture is rather self-explanatory; it has two people bump their rear ends together. Occasionally, people bump hips instead as an alternative. There are multiple contexts in which the butt bump can be used. Sometimes, two people will bump butts as a form of greeting, similar to the handshake and its alternate substitutes (sometimes, it's used as part of a secret handshake). Other times, it's used as a very popular dance move. It can also be used for teasing, flirtatious, and celebratory purposes. Note that both of the parties' butts/hips don't have to connect for this trope to count. As long as it's one person bumping someone else with theirs, it's alright for this trope. Can overlap with Shaking the Rump . Don't confuse with Ass Kicks You , where the butt is used for offensive purposes, rather than friendly ones, or with Flirtatious Smack on the Ass .
